channel.title: Series Preview on Emerald City Gear
channel.description: Recent content in Series Preview on Emerald City Gear

item.title: Back Home and Hungry: Mariners Host Astros in Must-Watch 4-Game Series
item.description: The Mariners return to T-Mobile Park for a crucial 4-game home stand against the Houston Astros, April 10–13. Here's what to watch — and how to be there.

item.title: The Astros Are Coming to T-Mobile Park — And This Is a Series You Need to See
item.description: The Seattle Mariners host the Houston Astros for a four-game divisional series April 10–13 at T-Mobile Park. Here's why this is the home stand you shouldn't miss.
